text: Investigation 2026-07-02 (actual CI logs via gh run view 28560336470 --log-failed). SCOPE: not a regression — R-CMD-check.yaml has NEVER passed (all 6 runs since 2026-04-12 fail; every platform 1 ERROR/2 WARN/2 NOTE, FAIL 17). Drivers: workflow dependencies='hard' (Suggests+GPU pkgs absent on CI), NOT_CRAN=true defeats skip_on_cran, error-on='warning'. Five signatures: (1) opencl-vs-cpu preferred_backend, 5 fails — REAL BUG: test-bughunt-dispatch.R:57-73 (amatrix-y85) sets amatrix_set_default_policy('opencl') and never restores it; leak only fires on CI where stub opencl is fastest. Fix: save/restore policy + optionally fall back to cpu for unregistered-policy backends (policy.R:9-17). (2) irlba_native, 1 ERROR — CI dep gap: irlba in Suggests not installed; test-bughunt-coverage-gap.R:167 lacks skip_if_not_installed; add any::irlba to workflow + guard. (3) allowed/available probe markers, 11 fails — env assumption: .backend_policy_repo_dir (test-regression-backend-startup-policy.R:40-53) matches installed pkg dir (DESCRIPTION but no source) so pkgload::load_all subprocess dies; require R/ source dir in finder. (4) getDLLRegisteredRoutines, 1 ERROR — same buggy repo-dir finder copied in test-regression-matrix-generic-exports.R:30; share fixed helper. (5) NaN chol_factor, test-track3-failure-modes.R:304 — REAL BUG: Linux LAPACK dpotrf doesn't flag NaN (info==0) while Accelerate errors; add explicit non-finite input check in chol_factor. ALSO FATAL (error-on=warning): non-ASCII em-dash in runtime sprintf backend-registry.R:164; undocumented as.matrix.* S3 + S4 !/[ methods; NOTE Rd \method markup. Bonus: determinant() dispatch fails without Matrix attached (seen in sweep output).
